title: eryngium vesiculosum
intro: Eryngium vesiculosum, also known as sea holly or sea bauble, is a type of flowering plant in the family Apiaceae. It is a perennial herb that has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and inflammation. The plant's leaves and flowers contain compounds with anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which provide health benefits such as reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and supporting immune function. Eryngium vesiculosum is often prepared as a tea or tincture, and it can also be used in herbal infusions and salves to harness its medicinal properties.
